---
title: "\'The Winds\'"
---

## \'The Winds\'

**Author:** Miss  Ashwell
**Date:** 1858-1860
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1858-December 1860)

### Notes

A series of scientific articles which appeared intermittently.  CMY told Alexander Macmillan in 1866 that they were written by a sister of Arthur Rawson Ashwell\'s.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
